name: Provider timeout
description: Injects 3 000 ms of latency on the primary provider (Anthropic) to simulate a stall, then falls back to OpenAI. Shows how the normalized envelope records fallback_triggered=true and provider_used differs from provider_requested.

input.transcript: Payment is declined on every retry since the last deploy went out at 14:00 UTC. The error message is generic: 'payment could not be processed'. Customer has tried three different cards.
